name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-grideye
nickname: SparkFun GridEYE 热成像传感器

description: SparkFun Panasonic GridEYE AMG88 8×8 热成像传感器 Blockly 库，支持像素温度读取、帧率设置、休眠控制和中断阈值配置。

description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun GridEYE AMG88 8x8 thermal sensor.
